records.title: Complete immutable historical evidence export is unavailable
records.description: The original conversation export and exact historical message locators are unavailable after the account migration.
records.impact: Accepted as a provenance limitation under PG0-E001; current approved sources remain usable after semantic review.

records.title: ADR-IMP-024 title is not evidenced
records.description: The historical title evidence gap was resolved during prior ADR normalization.

records.title: Implementation ADR decision bodies and section decisions remain partially unextracted
records.description: The historical extraction gap was resolved for the approved ADR corpus and normalized implementation records.

records.title: Foundational source bodies are provenance-limited
records.description: G0, G1, and the viability review are controlled as approved normalized current sources under PG0-E001; unavailable historical wording is not represented as recovered verbatim text.
records.impact: Accepted current-authority limitation; it does not prevent accurate release-candidate drafting.

records.title: AIOP and constitutional historical wording is provenance-limited
records.description: AIOP v1.0 and the Constitution are controlled as approved normalized current sources; exact historical section wording and constitutional enumeration wording remain unavailable.
records.impact: Accepted current-authority limitation; the normalized current sources govern the candidate.

records.title: Publication gate criteria require exact extraction
records.description: The approved P0–P6 planning responses and evaluable gate criteria are controlled.

records.title: Exact approval-locator coverage is incomplete
records.description: Some historical message-level approval locators remain unavailable; current source and approval bindings are retained with explicit provenance labels.
records.impact: Accepted as a provenance limitation under PG0-E001.

records.title: Architecture v1.0 release pin is not established
records.description: The working authorities and release candidate exist, but Architecture v1.0 approval, release tagging, and immutable pinning remain outstanding.
records.impact: Blocks formal release and final PG0 closure until B49 or the approved successor sequence completes.

records.title: Implementation non-ADR record decomposition remains incomplete
records.description: The approved implementation-planning decision corpus is record-complete.

records.title: Structured register public projection remains incomplete
records.description: The twelve approved public structured-register projections were installed and read back in P0-B30; the prior projection was stale only because its later closure state was not reflected in the public gap log.

records.title: Mixed-classification exact source packages require authority-safe routing
records.description: Eight exact source packages contain protected instance references and are formally deferred to Private Authority pointer/decomposition handling. They are excluded from this public release candidate and from the restricted working repository.
records.impact: Non-blocking for this Architecture v1.0 candidate; future exact-source publication remains separately controlled.

records.title: Public authoritative publication manifest was invalid
Restricted source pointer registry readback was incomplete
records.description: Restricted authority was corrected and read back during P0-B38/P0-B39.

records.title: Restricted registry authority metadata was stale
records.description: Corrected and merged during P0-B39 authority reconciliation.

records.title: Public gap-log projection was stale against mainline authority
records.description: The public projection omitted P0-B39 closure state and retained stale PUB-GAP-0012 status.
records.impact: Reconciled in the B48 repository-ready candidate; the public-repository update remains staged pending explicit destination/file authorization.
